segments.text: Isn't wisdom calling? Isn't understanding raising her voice?
On the top of the hill by the road, she stands up at the crossroads.
Beside the gates of the town, right there at the entrance, she cries out:
I'm calling out to you, everyone! My call is to everyone in the whole world!
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: If you're immature, learn how to grow up. If you're stupid, learn what makes good sense.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen to me because I have valuable things to explain to you.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I say what's right, because I tell the truth and I hate wickedness in all its forms.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words I say are true; none are false or misleading.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My words are straightforward to anyone with understanding; they are correct to those who have knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Choose my instruction over silver; choose knowledge over pure gold.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom is more valuable than rubies; everything you could ever want just doesn't compare!
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I, wisdom, am at home with good decisions. I know how to find knowledge and discernment.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Honoring the Lord means hating evil. So I hate pride and arrogance, wicked behavior and telling lies.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I have advice and good judgment; I know what makes sense, and I have power.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: It's because of me that kings reign, and rulers issue fair decrees.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: It's because of me that leaders and nobles govern—all who rule justly.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love those who love me, and those who really look for me will find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: With me go riches and honor, lasting wealth and prosperity.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The fruit I produce is better than gold, even pure gold, and my harvest is better than even the best silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I live in a way that's right; I follow the paths of justice.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I grant wealth to those who love me; I fill their treasure storehouses.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The Lord created me first of all; I was made before anything else.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was formed a long time ago, at the first, before the world began.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was born when there were no ocean depths, when there were no springs pouring out water.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was born before the mountains or the hills had been formed,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he hadn't made the earth and its fields or any of the earth's dust.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was there when he placed the heavens in position, when he drew the horizon over the ocean,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he made the clouds in the sky above, when he created the springs of the oceans,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he set limits on the sea so that the waters would not go farther than he ordered, and when he laid out the foundations of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Then I was beside him as a master craftsman. I made him happy every day, and I was always full of joy in his presence.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was so happy in the world he created, celebrating together with human beings.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: And now, my sons, listen to me, for happy are those who follow my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen to my instruction and be wise—do not reject it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Happy are those who listen to me, watching for me every day at my doors, waiting at my entrance way.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For those who find me, find life, and are accepted by the Lord.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But those who don't find me hurt themselves; everyone who hates me loves death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
